2606.06491.title: TempoVLA: Learning Speed-Controllable Vision-Language-Action Policies
2606.06491.paper_summary: Robot manipulation alternates between low-risk transit phases that call for fast execution and high-risk contact stages that demand slow, precise motion. Yet existing Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) only inherit a single fixed speed from training demonstrations. Prior efforts to accelerate VLAs through model compression, KV-cache reuse, or reinforcement learning only shift the policy from one fixed speed to another, and leave deceleration almost unexplored. We observe that the magnitude of each predicted action already governs how fast the robot moves, opening a direct route to controllable execution speed. We turn this observation into TempoVLA, a single VLA whose execution speed is controlled by an explicit condition. TempoVLA combines two coupled components. (1) A data-side Variable-Speed Trajectory Augmentation (VSTA) that re-times demonstration to any target speed by merging or splitting actions while preserving its motion semantics. (2) A model-side conditioning mechanism that feeds the speed to the policy. Statistics show that VSTA reaches the requested speed with negligible motion error. Experiments in simulation and on real-world tasks demonstrate that TempoVLA achieves flexible speed control in both directions, while VSTA additionally boosts the default $1\times$ performance via better data utilization. Furthermore, by cooperating with a large multimodal model, TempoVLA realizes dynamic speed control, accelerating through low-risk phases and decelerating for high-risk ones.
2606.06491.paper_summary_zh: 機器人操作在低風險的過渡階段和高風險的接觸階段之間交替進行，前者需要快速執行，而後者則要求緩慢而精確的動作。然後，現有的視覺-語言-行動模型（VLA）僅從訓練示範中繼承一個固定的速度。之前通過模型壓縮、KV-cache重用或強化學習加速VLA的努力，只是將策略從一個固定速度轉移到另一個，幾乎沒有探索減速。我們觀察到，每個預測行動的大小已經決定了機器人的移動速度，這為可控的執行速度開啟了一條直接的途徑。我們將這一觀察轉化為TempoVLA，一個由明確條件控制執行速度的單一VLA。TempoVLA結合了兩個耦合的組件。(1) 一個數據側的可變速度軌跡增強（VSTA），通過合併或拆分動作來重新調整示範到任何目標速度，同時保持其運動語義。(2) 一個模型側的條件機制，將速度輸入到策略中。統計數據顯示，VSTA以可忽略的運動誤差達到請求的速度。在模擬和現實世界任務中的實驗表明，TempoVLA在兩個方向上實現了靈活的速度控制，而VSTA還通過更好的數據利用提高了默認的$1\times$性能。此外，通過與大型多模態模型的合作，TempoVLA實現了動態速度控制，在低風險階段加速，在高風險階段減速。
2606.06491.author: Dong Jing et.al.
2606.06491.authors: Dong Jing, Jingchen Nie, Tianqi Zhang, Jiaqi Liu, Huaxiu Yao, Zhiwu Lu, Mingyu Ding
